rule_display_names.swaggerhub-api-description-required: API description must be present and non-empty string
rule_display_names.swaggerhub-model-properties-examples-req: All model properties must have examples
rule_display_names.swaggerhub-api-license-required: API license must be present and non-empty string
rule_display_names.swaggerhub-info-license-required: Info object must have license object
rule_display_names.swaggerhub-info-description-required: Info description must be present and non-empty string
rule_display_names.swaggerhub-operation-summary-is-a-senten: Summary should start with upper case and end with a dot
rule_display_names.swaggerhub-channel-path-empty-paramater-: Channel path must not have empty parameter substitution pattern
rule_display_names.swaggerhub-headers-schema-type-object-re: Headers schema type must be object
rule_display_names.swaggerhub-asyncapi-schema-latest-versio: AsyncAPI schema must be latest version (2.6.0)
rule_display_names.swaggerhub-operation-tags-at-least-one: Operation must have a tag and non-empty string
rule_display_names.swaggerhub-operation-operationId-require: OperationId must be present and non-empty string
rule_display_names.swaggerhub-operation-tags-only-one: Operation must have one and only one tag
rule_display_names.swaggerhub-operation-summary-required: Operation summary must be present and non-empty string
rule_display_names.swaggerhub-server-url-ending-slash-prohi: Server URL must not end with slash
rule_display_names.swaggerhub-asyncapi-tags-at-least-one: AsyncAPI object must have non-empty tags array
rule_display_names.swaggerhub-api-title-required: API title must be present and non-empty string
rule_display_names.swaggerhub-channels-operations-descripti: Operation description must be present and non-empty string
rule_display_names.swaggerhub-local-definitions-prohibited: API must not have local definitions (i.e. only $refs are allowed)
rule_display_names.swaggerhub-channel-path-ending-slash-pro: Channel path must not end with slash
rule_display_names.swaggerhub-operation-description-require: Operation description must be present and non-empty string
rule_display_names.swaggerhub-operation-default-response-re: Operation must have a default response
rule_display_names.swaggerhub-servers-at-least-one: AsyncAPI object must have non-empty servers object
rule_display_names.swaggerhub-api-contact-required: API contact must be present and non-empty string
rule_display_names.swaggerhub-channel-path-prohibited-chara: Channel path must not include query ("?") or fragment ("#") delimiter
